author: Haroen Viaene
subject: refactor: rename things (algolia/vue-instantsearch#529)
body:
* refactor: rename ais-index to ais-instant-search

* refactor: rename exports to have Ais prefix

* chore: rename stories to the widget name

* chore: rename in docs too!

* chore: rename 1

* chore: rename 2

* chore: put name in every file

* docs: update migration

* refactor(plugin): move into separate files

* chore: update snaps etc.

* docs: rename appId & apiKey -> searchClient

* chore: forgotten renames

* docs(InstantSearch): rename file

* fix(InstantSearch): fully correct naming

* test(main): test install & suit naming is correct

* docs: rename files with correct capitalisation

* docs: fix typo

* test: remove useless one

* test: use real Vue (localVue doesn't install)

* docs(InstantSearch): use correct credentials and add an error if necessary on apiKey

* docs(components): expand & make less error prone

* chore: remove unused eslint rule

* docs(migration): add index name in docs

* chore: rename one

* chore: rename two

* chore: more rename

* chore: rename two
